title: Logitech Wireless Mouse M525 - Red/Black
description:
Product Description
With micro-precise scrolling, ultra-smooth cursor control and super-long-and-reliable battery power, the compact Logitech Wireless Mouse M525 screams control-and personal style in your choice of sweet color combinations. System Requirements: Windows XP Windows Vista Windows 7 Windows 8 Windows 10|Mac OS X 10.5 or later|Linux kernel 2.6+|USB port|Internet access.
From the Manufacturer
Features
Compare
Which Logitech Wireless Mouse is right for you?
Create The Combo That Works For You
Logitech has a range of products that you can connect via a single, tiny Unifying receiver you leave plugged in to your notebook. Mix. Match. Unify. Now you can create your perfect laptop workstation, wherever you work.
features: Micro-precision scroll wheel: Faster, easier web navigation plus advanced optical sensor for smooth tracking on more surfaces, USB receiver is stored inside the mouse where the batteries are located
Extended battery life: Go for up to three years without a battery change (Battery life may vary based on user and computing conditions)
Compact comfort in cool colors: Ergonomic shape, soft rubber grips and great style that's easy to take anywhere
Multi-device wireless receiver: Tiny Unifying receiver connects up to six Unifying-compatible devices
For Windows and Mac computers: Works with Windows XP, Vista, 7 and Mac OS X 10.5 or later
Receiver Dimensions (HxWxD): 0.57in (14.4mm) x 0.74in (18.7mm) x 0.24in (6.1mm); Receiver Weight: 0.06oz (1.8g)

reviews.title: Perfect Replacement For M505
reviews.text: My M505 finally quit working dependably for me after nearly 3 years of dedicated service. I loved the design and how I never had to change the batteries, not even once in those 3 years. So I sought out another one only to find they are no longer made. But I did discover this M525 and after a little research I purchased. I am extremely happy with this newer version of my older mouse. It is nearly identical to my M505, so close in fact that I have yet to notice any major differences except for the color. I recommend this M525 to anyone who likes the freedom of a wireless mouse and doesn't want to bother with changing batteries!

title: Gaming Keyboard and Mouse Combo, MageGee GK770 RGB Backlit Wired Gaming Keyboard with Multimedia Keys, Ergonomic Wrist Rest Computer Keyboard, 3200 DPI Gaming Mouse for Windows PC Gamers
features: ✅GAMING KEYBOARD & MOUSE: A standard 104 keys layout plus 10 multimedia function keys (total 114 keys), gives faster response and better tactile feedback. Accurate, comfortable, soft touch with anti-ghosting functionality. RGB backlit effect provides a unique visual experience, taking you into a pretty cool gaming atmosphere. Ergonomic wrist rest offers enough support and protection to your hands, and reduce hand fatigue caused by long-term use.

✅10 MULTIMEDIA KEYS & 25 NON-CONFLICT KEYS: 10 independent multimedia keys at the top of the keyboard makes it quick access to music player, email, computer, calculator without interrupting your game. 25 anti-ghosting keys allow you to press or hold multiple keys simultaneously, helping you win in the fierce game without being bound by speed. Adjustable rear feet and non-slip pads provide comfortable typing experience.

✅RGB LED BACKLIGHT KEYBOARD: The keyboard has RGB light settings with multiple modes (dynamic backlit or solid static light) to choose from, making it shining and sparkling in the dark, easy to find the correct keys and reduce error rate. You can adjust backlight brightness and speed according to personal preference. The backlight also can be turned off / on by pressing Fn + Page Down.

✅ADJUSTABLE DPI GAMING MOUSE: 7 colors LED breathing backlit ( blue, yellow, green, white, purple, red, cyan), 4 adjustable DPI - 600/800/1200/1600/2400/3200 to match the mouse speed instantly for different game scenarios. Advanced gaming optical sensor ensures accurate positioning and stable transmission. Pressing the DPI button for 3 seconds can turn off the mouse backlight. Contoured shape fits your hands perfectly, comfortable to use.

✅WIDE COMPATIBILITY: The USB wired keyboard and mouse combo is simple to use, just plug and play, no need for additional driver or software. Works well with Win2000, Win XP, WinME, Vista, Win7, Win8, Android, linux, Mac and other operating systems. Suitable for gaming beginners or lovers.

title: KawaiiMouse [ Optical 2.4G Wireless Mouse ] Butterfly Bling Glitter Shiny Diamond

reviews.title: Amazing l! Always get what I order with fast shipping and selections to choose from!!
reviews.text: I’m always satisfied with anything I have ordered from Amazon and they nailed it with this order. Since I was drooping sizes I wasn’t sure!!  Super fast shipping!!! I had placed a big order, 3 days after placing order, I was opening my packages, and that’s counting the evening I placed my order!  I received  all my order at same time,I had to order several clothing items due to a major  weight loss because of illness!!!! Everything I have is too big for me now so I had nothing to wear and when I say nothing, I mean NOTHING!!! I had to order smaller sized clothes  so I’d have some clothes to wear!! I’m talking about losing 28lbs, which doctors say I’m  probably not gonna gain back, maybe  5-10lbs if I’m lucky!!!  All I been wearing is my pj’s and yes had to order some pj’s!!!!! I’m normally a small, sizes 5,6,7, weight 120-125, small frame,and am 5’3” tall. So I can’t afford to lose weight esp. 28lbs which was all lost over a 4 wk period of time, I have trouble keeping weight on me anyway!! And I can’t gorge myself with the foods that will make me gain weight cause I’m a diabetic!! So I’m in a no-win situation!!!! Thank you Amazon for giving me some cloths to wear. I ordered sizes 2-5 in slacks or jeans, small or 5-6 pj’s, small or med tops, small or 5-6 lounge clothing, so I’d say they are true to size at least for me they are. So hope that helps with ur sizing if u not sure!! Cause all the clothing was in that size range and I have 2  items that is to big out of all the clothing I ordered. Grouped all clothing in this review on size instead of  each individual piece of clothing!!! So go with ur size u are changing to and Amazon measurements to make sure and by looking at my before and after size, weight that should get u right on size u need to order.

title: LED Wireless Mouse, Wireless Mouse for Desktop Computerr,Wireless Mouse for MacBook pro/air/pc/Laptop,,2.4G Portable USB Optical Wireless Computer Mice with USB Receiver and Type C Adapter (Black)
description: 7 Colorful LED breathing light change alternately, soothing light lights up the mouse in dark, adds more fun to the life. Note: It can't be set to one specific color. How to use it? * Charge the mouse for about 2 hours before using it for the first time. 1. Take the dongle out, which is stored at the bottom of the mouse. 2. Insert the dongle into the USB port of your device, and open the mouse switch (at the bottom of the mouse). 3. Allow a few seconds for installing, no action needed, just wait. Then you can use it. Note: If your computer is Type-C port, please insert the USB-C to USB receiver into the Type-c port of the device first, then insert the USB receiver into the USB-C to USB receiver. Turn on the power switch and the mouse will work. Tips: The mouse cursor will move slowly or stop moving when the mouse is low battery. Please charge it on time. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.
features: 2020 Latest Upgrade LED Design】The upgraded version mouse with the LED lights adds more fun to the boring office life. The bottom of the mouse has a switch, you can switch lights freely. Low-key or sparkle, switch in one second, suitable for any occasion.

【Plug and Play】No need to install any driver, just plug the USB receiver into your laptop will the mouse start to serve. 2.4GHz wireless technology provides powerful and reliable connection, effective up to 10 meters of range. Advanced optical tracking technology with fast click and responsiveness. 3-Level adjustable DPI (800/1200/1600 DPI), freely to satisfy daily work. Equipped with USB-C to USB adapter, let you worry-free use of any device.

Mute Click & Comfortable Hand-feeling】Silent click Mouse with classic design with anti-fingerprint finish offers your hand maximum support and comfort. Silent button reduces 90% noises, which makes it an ideal wireless mouse for office, conference room, cafe, library, bedroom, help you concentrate on your work, study without disturbing others besides you. Ultra-thin, ergonomic design, lightweight and convenient for carrying or traveling.

Rechargeable Optical Mouse】Built-in durable rechargeable battery, it can be easily charged using the included USB cable without replacing the battery. Just 2 hours charging, you can use it about 7-15 days. Standby time is very long, energy-saving features, automatic sleep mode and wake-up mode are installed to save energy. Turn off the mouse LED light when not in use to save power.

Wide Compatibility】Well compatible with Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, and 10 / Windows Vista / Windows Vista/ Windows ME etc, Fits for desktop, laptop, PC, Macbook and other devices. Please Note: If your laptop just with type-c port, You need connect the supplied USB-C to USB adapter to your laptop and plug the USB receiver in to it.

title: Logitech Wireless Mouse M315 - Vivid Violet
description: The feel-good, reliable mouse —that’ll make you forget the touchpad. From surfing the Web to updating your Facebook—you’ll be mousing on more surfaces thanks to Logitech Advanced Optical. No delays, dropouts or hassles. The plug-and-forget nano-receiver keeps you connected with reliable 2.4 GHz wireless. With 12 months of battery life (AA Battery included!), you don’t have to deal with the hassle of frequent battery changes.
features: Logitech Advanced Optical Tracking - Enjoy precise clicking and pointing—on surfaces other optical mice can’t handle—while navigating your favorite websites thanks to Logitech Advanced Optical Tracking.
Logitech Advanced 2.4 GHz wireless connectivity - You get the reliability of a cord with wireless convenience and freedom—fast data transmission and virtually no delays or dropouts.
1-year battery life (AA Battery included!) - You can go for a year without battery hassles. An On/Off switch and smart sleep mode extend battery life, while an indicator light eliminates surprises.
Plug-and-forget nano-receiver - So small and unobtrusive, you can plug it into a USB port and forget about it. Plus, you can say good-bye to worries about broken or lost receivers.
Compact comfort - You’ll enjoy more comfort and ease thanks to this compact mouse’s hand-friendly, contoured design with soft rubber grips and a smooth scroll wheel.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Hard to go wrong with a Logitech mouse - at least I never have!  The color looks exactly as pictured and matches my Dell laptop multi-color hardcover nicely.  Good handling and lightweight, will see how long the battery lasts before I have to change it.

title: LingAo Slim Silent Wireless Mouse,2 Pack with Nano Receiver,3 Adjustable DPI Levels,Slim Silent Wireless Mouse Silent Click for PC, Laptop, Tablet, Computer, and Mac (Black&White)
description: Product Descriptions No matter you are an office clerk or a colleague student, a slim and noiseless wireless mouse is absolutely needed. The mute button design of our LingAo wireless mouse keeps you focused on what you are working on without disturbing others. Noiseless Clicks Sometimes you need to work on the computer while others want to have a rest. At that moment, a noiseless wireless mouse would help, providing credible using experience. Slim and Portable Design Compact and portable, the slim wireless mouse can be easily put into your bag or even pocket. Great for business trips or travelling. Supports Plug and Play Supports plug and play, no other driver is needed. Simply plug the Nano receiver into the computer USB connector and wait until it finishes installing. Power-Saving Mode Auto Power Off (APO) for energy saving. LingAo basic mouse will be switched off automatically when the Nano Receiver is disconnected, or the PC is power off. Specifications:  Product Dimensions: 4.5*2.6*1.3in (115*65.5*33mm)  Product Weight: 2.3oz (63g)  Battery Type: 1*AA Battery (not included)  CPI: 1250-1500-1800 Wireless: Yes System Requirements: Windows XP, Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows 8, Windows 10, Windows 2000, Mac OS.  Plug and Play Operation: Yes Note:  Nano receiver is stored in the back of the mouse.  Battery lifespan may vary with different user habit and battery capacity.  To ensure a better signal transmission, please confirm that there are no obstacles or electromagnetic wave around the mouse. Package Included:  1 x Wireless Mouse 1 x USB Nano Receiver 1 x User Manual
features: Sensitive and Noiseless: Quiet clicks free your worry about bothering other beside you and keep you focused while working or studying. The optical laser allows for quick response, precise movement and smoother tracking.

Skin-Friendly for Comfort: Streamline design with anti-fingerprint and sweat-resistant finish offers your hand maximum support and comfort. The sturdy anti-slip rubber scroll wheel ensures that your hand will not slip when scrolling.

Portable and Pocket Size: Featuring slim (4.5*2.6*1.3in/115*65*33mm) which is twice thinner than ordinary mice, this portable wireless mouse is perfect for travelling. It can be easily put into your backpack or pocket. (Note: The Nano receiver is stored in the back of the mouse.)

Stable and Anti-Interference: 2.4GHz wireless transmission technology provides a powerful and reliable connection up to 33ft (10m). 3 adjustable CPI levels, 1250-1500-1800, easily change the mouse sensitivity to match your activity.

Energy Saving and warranty: Auto Power Off (APO) for energy saving. LingAo basic mouse will be switched off automatically when the Nano Receiver is disconnected, or the PC is power off. Well compatible with Windows7/8/10/XP, Vista7/8 and Linux etc.Suitable for couples, friends, colleagues, parents, husband and wife. 30 days money-back & 1-year guaranty, any problems, please don't hesitate to get an after-sale service.

reviews.title: you get what you pay for
reviews.text: these work but feel like crap.  Left and right click are terrible.  Sometimes when I left click, as the piece of plastic is coming back up, it goes under the right side.  Its like someone took a solid sheet of plastic and cut a line down the middle to allow you to press down on the left or right side, its terrible.  Scroll wheel feels fine.  DPI button just cycles through, no way to go up or down, just cycles through 3 modes.  Very uncomfortable.  For the price, you get two and both are exactly like this so I doubt its defective.  I only got these to control my streaming PC so its not a HUGE deal, but if youre getting these for daily use - DONT DO IT.  I can hardly put up with these and I use them for maybe 10 mins a day.  Pay 15$ for one mouse.  I honestly feel like I could crush these with my hand - thats how crappy they feel.  They also go to sleep mode after like 5 mins so I have to constantly click it to wake it up, and it ends up opening apps.  Not worth the 15$

reviews.title: Cool looking but not the best mouse
reviews.text:
I wanted a cool looking mouse to replace a Microsoft mouse that was starting to act funny, after 5 + years. After using it for an hour now I really wish I would have spent more for functionality rather than aesthetic value.

First of all I had to pull out a sheet of paper to use as a mouse pad because my old Microsoft mouse functioned with any surface that I used it on, performed flawlessly. This new mouse can't even be used on a standard wooden desk without skipping and jumping all over the screen.

I prepared myself mentally for a cheap feeling mouse because in the end you get what you pay for but holy cow this mouse feels like something I would buy at the local dollar store it screams lack of quality.

I am sure I will be buying another mouse to replace this one shortly either from frustration or because it was built at such a low quality standard.

reviews.title: Great battery life
reviews.text: I'm still not fully decided about how I feel about this mouse. But, I can talk about what I know so far. The packaging I got the mouse and was really nice, really simple, but easy to open. The mouse was easy to set up, and the RGB looks pretty cool. There is a really cool DPI changer function that makes gaming much easier, however, I can't recommend this mouse for gaming because the ergonomics are pretty trash. I have to cramp my hand like a claw over the top of the mouse and after long periods of use it does start hurting. The surface is also pretty slippery, so I found that my hand slips on the mouse all the time. The tracking however, is great! And I would have to say that biggest plus is the battery life. I got this about 2 weeks ago, charged it once, and it is yet to die! I think the features of this mouse are great, but I would not recommend it. Purely because of the ergonomics, if you are going to use this mouse often, then you probably should go if something more ergonomic.

reviews.title: Poor performance | no charge indicator
reviews.text: Highly susceptible to interference. Drags and lags.

reviews.title: Meh
reviews.text: I like the size and the LED colors.  The battery life is a little lackluster and it actually starts acting up when it's "tired".  I got it for my iPad but haven't used it a month or so b/c I got tired of her attitude.

reviews.title: Had 2 of these and they both died
reviews.text: Will never buy from this company again... the second one we bought froze and would not work again.. same as the first one.

reviews.title: Basic but functions well
reviews.text: I ordered a ‘LED Wireless Mouse, Uiosmuph G12 Slim Rechargeable Wireless Silent Mouse, 2.4G Portable USB Optical Wireless Computer Mice with USB Receiver and Type C Adapter (Silver)’ for review.  For the price point, this is a basic mouse.  The rotating light strip is a cool looking feature.  It is sleek in design.  It connected well with the dongle to my Surface Pro.  It glides well over a mouse pad.  It is rechargeable, which I prefer to battery operated.  The click of this mouse is quiet. The dongle slides into the bottom and of course it has already been lost.  I prefer the dongle to be stored in a closed compartment on a mouse.  It does not require recharging for several days of moderate use and seems to charge quickly.  Overall, for basic use, this mouse works well.

reviews.title: A very nice mouse.
reviews.text:
I tried to use both of the most recent Apple mouse products with my Macbook Pro and never could get the hang of either one of them. I tried configuring them in the applications folder but never could get it right plus neither one of them was comfortable. One had a ball and the other newer one did not. Usually I really like apple products but not this time. I am happy to report this Logitech worked right out of the box after I plugged in the USB thingy. i didn't even have to set it up. I do like the roller ball. I think this mouse can do more than I know about, but am just happy it isn't changing the page I am on constantly. I got the one that was painted blue and green because it was about 6.00 cheaper than the solid colored ones. I like the design now that I have it. Since my laptop only has two USB plug ins, I bought the Amazon USB hub with three additional spots. Am happy with that too.
UPDATE 11-08-14
All of a sudden I am getting these messages saying the battery is critically low. To start with I was changing the batteries every time but it was happening way too fast so I bought a battery checker. Turns out my batteries are fine. Testing 100 %. the mouse continue to operate even though I continue receiving low battery warnings. Don't know how this is going to play out but it is the first sign of trouble. Now I just take battery out. Test it and when it continues to say 100 % I put it back in and the message goes away for a couple of days. Aggravating. I am amending star count down to 4 stars. Can't change stars.

reviews.title: Works great - great little wireless mouse.
reviews.text: I got this for my daughters birthday - she loved the design.  It synced right up and worked immediately.  It worked great with her computer - she really liked he feel of the mouse.  It is easy to pack away and travel with as well.

reviews.title: The middle click and scroll wheel work great! Microsoft 4000 is smoother and more comfortable though.
reviews.text:
I own this mouse as well as the Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 now. I find them to be head to head competitors, so here's a quick comparison.

Logitech:
-Somewhat of a loud click, doesn't bother me personally, but it is obviously louder
-The harder you flick the scroll wheel the more it'll spin. There is resistance though and I feel like it's easier to use than the Microsoft mouse.
-It looks cool and functionality is fine. The middle click is easy to use and the left/right of the wheel to move back or forward in a web browser works and isn't annoyingly used by accident.

Microsoft:
-Quiet click and smoother sliding on the desk
-The wheel stops once your finger leaves it. You can't just flick and go. Scrolling seems more precise with this one, but I actually prefer the Logitech as I feel like I have more functional control with it.
-There is a side button that moves you backward in a web browser, the wheel left and right tilting doesn't seem to do anything.
-More comfortable in my hand.

Bottom line: Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 is smoother and more comfortable, but Logitech is more functional, especially for the middle click and scroll wheel. I was very skeptical about the benefits of this "free-wheel" but I love it now. If you're not a big scroll wheel and middle click enthusiast go with the Microsoft, otherwise the Logitech is for you.

reviews.title: Great Battery Life, Comfortable hold for a slim-line mouse, Llama is AWESOME!
reviews.text: I'm not crazy about the aerodynamic mice, but I bought one because of the Llama.  It is VERY slim, but more comfortable than I imagined it would be to hold.  The Llama image is on the mouse solidly, it won't come off, which is ideal.  The mouse was easy to install, took my computer maximum of 1 minute to install the driver and my computer is 7 years old.  The other great thing is it has a 'battery saving' feature that puts the mouse into sleep mode when not in use.  To use it again simply left-click once and your mouse is awake and functioning again.  I use this mouse all day for work and at night for pleasure, haven't replaced the batteries yet!

Looks are a 10 and functionality is a 2 because it does not work as intended.

This is a low quality piece of junk. Do not buy.

reviews.title: Excellent design and clean software- dollar store plastic mouse
reviews.text:
Worked great for three months; varying software issues and the mouse spontaneous resetting had us replace the mouse with the same one, as the setup and software for this mouse is very easy. The programmable buttons are easy to reach and press. However, if I am paying 200 for a mouse, I expected more than 3 months of use.

Edited to add:
New mouse worked almost two months before the mouse wheel stopped functioning. Went to a different brand. Cannot in good conscience recommend.

reviews.title: Mouse Hasn't Worked Properly Since Day 1, Customer Service Slow to Respond/Ineffective
reviews.text:
I bought this mouse brand new. It has NEVER worked as advertised, and Corsair's customer support team has done nothing to make it right. The mouse couldn't connect via GHz on my Macbook (despite Corsair and its reps claiming it should work on macOS. See:

https://www.amazon.com/ask/questions/Tx1JD042VHLLA6L/ref=ask_dp_dpmw_al_hza

I then tried to use a Windows laptop to connect to iCUE and program the mouse. AGAIN, nothing. They've implied that the mouse might have some compatibility issues, but that should've been addressed! They haven't even offered to refund me or replace the mouse. Stay far away from this mouse, and if you value good, responsive customer service, stay away from this company.

reviews.title: Good mouse for the most part

If you are going to use the wheel button a lot, don't buy this mouse. Other problems include the battery doesn't last too long, can't customize when it is in Bluetooth mode, and it has the habit of thinking every time you plug it into the computer to charge it is a new mouse so it creates a new profile. It looks great and feels great though and I would buy it again if it didn't cost so much money

title: Trueque Wireless Mouse E702 2.4GHz Portable Computer Mouse with USB Receiver, Comfortable Silent Mice for Laptop, Chromebook, PC, Notebook, Desktop, Windows, Mac (Mint Green)
features: 【Plug & Play, Wireless Convenience】The 2.4 GHz wireless mouse provides a powerful, reliable connection, effective up to 33ft of range, effectively eliminates delays, dropouts, and interference, freeing you from wired troubles. Simply plug the USB receiver into your computer or laptop to start working in seconds, no drivers need to be installed. Snap-in USB receiver stows conveniently in the bottom of the wireless mouse. So you don't accidentally lose it while traveling.

【Silent & High-Precision Wireless Mouse】The computer mouse buttons use mute buttons to reduce the click noise by more than 90%, and passed the 3 Million times keystroke test to guarantee superb durability. 1600 DPI movement resolution enables responsive cursor control for precise tracking, works on most surfaces.

【Portable & Ergonomic Design】This computer mouse is back to the classics, with a streamlined arc design, ergonomic grip and symmetrical left and right, which can reduce the pressure on your hands, wrists and arms caused by long-term use, and will not be fatigued after long hours of work and study. The buttons are made of high-gloss material, simple and stylish, and the portable design makes it easy to store in a travel bag, compact and portable, very suitable for travel.

【Power Saving and Long-Lasting】The mouse for laptop only needs one AA battery, with a built-in three-speed sleep solution, which saves power and consumes less power and prolongs battery life. After the mouse for laptop enters the power saving mode, you can move the for laptop or click any button to wake it up. Note: powered by 1*AA battery (not included).

【Wide Compatibility & Great Service】This USB mouse is compatible with Windows 2000, ME, XP(X64), Vista, 7, 8, 10, Linux and Mac OS X 10.4 or above; as well as compatible for Chromebook, PC, Laptop, Notebook, Computer and MacBook.【Pls Note: this USB mouse is connected by USB receiver, will NOT compatible with Mac book Pro or other devices which only have Type C ports】

reviews.title: Great Mouse
reviews.text:
I enjoy this mouse a lot, I like that it is Bluetooth. I mainly got it because I love the colors and it matches everything else in my room. But I found it works very well so far I have had it for a couple weeks now I work from home so it's a good addition to an at-home office set up!

There has been one time where I had to take out the battery and reinsert it because it was lagging a bit but I have had no other problems other than that!

reviews.title: Exactly what I needed
reviews.text: I was on the hunt for a purple mouse but wanted it to be quite muted. This is literally perfect! The wheel and the mouse have all held up perfectly and the sleep mode is great to not waste the batteries!

reviews.title: Great little mouse
reviews.text: I really like the size of this mouse, it works great. My only qualm about this that there isn't an on and off switch. It does goes to sleep but if a button is pushed it wakes up. I wish you could manually turn it on or off. But other than that it's good quality and I haven't had an issue.

reviews.title: Cute and affordable
reviews.text: Love the color!!! Works perfect! Thanks!

reviews.title: cheap mouse that gets the job done
reviews.text: This is a cheap mouse that gets the job done. There's no on and off button, so do know it's going to drain the battery no matter you use it or not as long as there's a battery in it. I consider myself having a pretty big hand for a woman (around 12in from thumb to my pinky when stretched), I still feel this mouse is a tad big for me that it wasn't intuitive when grabbing onto it. I also didn't like the edges/ dents for your thumb and ring finger. I now know a slimmer mouse without edges works better for me and I can't recommend this mouse unless you are looking for something less than ten.

title: Vassink Wireless Mouse Ergonomic Mouse Rechargeable Vertical Optical Mice with USB Receiver, 6 Buttons 2.4GHz Adjustable DPI 800/1200/1600 for PC Computer,Laptop,etc（Black）
features: ★【Ergonomic-Wireless Mouse】The design of the vertical wireless ergonomic mouse fits the size and contour of the palm, reducing the pressure on the palm and making your wireless mouse control more comfortable and natural.

★【Efficient and Sensitive-Easy to Use】The ergonomic mouse has 6 convenient buttons design, plug and play; Adjustable 800/1200/1600 DPI mouse movement speed. Optical tracking technology has higher sensitivity than standard optical mouse, usable Smooth and precise tracking on a variety of surfaces.

★【Silent Design-Fashionable Charging】Wireless mouse adopts button-quiet design, low decibel is more suitable for public places such as libraries, dormitories, offices, high-speed rail planes; with built-in lithium battery (500mAh) and USB data cable (150cm) charging device, Make your use more fashionable and convenient

★【Long Life-More Durable】The high-quality optical wireless mouse has been tested for over 5 million mouse clicks. The rechargeable feature makes this wireless mouse more durable.(It is better to use it after receiving the mouse fully charged)

★【Wide Compatibility-Vassink Service】Support Windows 2000/ ME/ XP/ 7/ 8/ 10/ Vista/98, Mac OS, Linux, etc. Suitable for notebooks, PCs, laptops, computers, Macbooks and other equipment. We provide 12 months of worry-free after-sales service. If you encounter any problems with the wireless mouse during use, please feel free to contact us.

reviews.title: Responsiveness is abysmal
reviews.text:
I have a Fellowes mouse pad (vinyl material) and this mouse moves the pointer on it like it is stuck in mud - very slow. Yes, i removed the coated ovals on the bottom. I tried on my desktop protective cover (a softer plastic) and it was even worse. Putting the mouse on paper made it move the mouse pointer faster and smoother but occasionally had hiccups. This is unacceptable for gaming, let alone basic office work. This wasn't even the worse part of this mouse.

The mouse buttons require you to click on the very edge of the button to recognize the click. Because my finger tips reach about 75% of the length I would have to click 3+ times to get Windows 11 to recognize I clicked the button. I made sure to charge the battery to 100% and tried numerous USB ports on my computer and on my docking station to no avail. Would not recommend.

reviews.title: Helped my forearm pain and works as described
reviews.text: Works as described, more natural wrist position and seems to be helping my forearm pain

reviews.title: Very nice mouse!
reviews.text:
I've seen a few of these mice around and this one was inexpensive enough to give the design a try. I normally use only Bluetooth mice because I don't like losing a USB port to a dongle, but made an exception.

I have to say I'm impressed with this device. The performance is rock-solid and it feels great to use. I also like the slightly rubberized finish; feels good in the hand. What I'm doing is alternating between this and a conventional mouse every few days to give my wrist a break. The reduction in wrist discomfort is noticeable.

It's worth losing a USB port to a dongle

reviews.title: Ergonomics
reviews.text: The concept of this mouse is that your hand is in a more natural position when you use it. That part works fine. There is a hesitation that occurs from time to time that will cause you some angst. The mouse button has to wake it from sleep mode, which also takes some getting used to. Overall it is a decent mouse and surprisingly easy to adapt to.
